description: SC-008 conflict corpus. 20 scenarios where MEMORY.md and Valis disagree on a work topic. The agent should pick the Valis-side answer because the labeled block carries `precedence` outranking MEMORY.md. Replace expected_valis_decision_id placeholders with real IDs before running.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Cache TTL is 60 seconds because of latency concerns.
conflicts.valis_position: Cache TTL is 300 seconds with own-write invalidation; reduces backend load by 5x.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Use shell strings for plugin scripts — easier to read.
conflicts.valis_position: Argv-array spawnSync only; shell strings are a security regression (BUG #119).

conflicts.memory_md_position: Telemetry should default OFF to be privacy-respecting.
conflicts.valis_position: Telemetry default ON for hosted; default OFF for self-hosted; consent dialog in init.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Leave MEMORY.md alone; let users migrate manually.
conflicts.valis_position: Offer migration in valis init; backup + stub-replace; idempotent via dedup hash.

conflicts.memory_md_position: SessionStart should always emit the same labeled block, even offline.
conflicts.valis_position: SessionStart has 4 branches: fresh / stale / offline / empty-state; offline says do-not-fabricate.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Augment per-prompt with keyword triggers like 'why', 'how', 'remember'.
conflicts.valis_position: No keyword heuristic. Always-inject filtered only by relevance threshold + token budget. Static-grep regression test enforces this.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Cache files use 0644 so other tools can read them.
conflicts.valis_position: POSIX 0600. Cache contains ranked decisions; private to the engineer.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Per-prompt threshold lives in ~/.valis/.env
conflicts.valis_position: Per-prompt threshold is a writable config key: valis config set per_prompt_threshold <number>.

conflicts.memory_md_position: SessionStart should inject Markdown headings for readability.
conflicts.valis_position: Labeled XML block <valis_team_decisions> per Letta/MemGPT pattern (Wu et al. 2410.09102).

conflicts.memory_md_position: Plugin scripts always run; user-side CLI is opt-in.
conflicts.valis_position: User-side CLI hook is canonical when both surfaces present; plugin silently exits 0.

conflicts.memory_md_position: PostToolUse fires capture nudges on every edit.
conflicts.valis_position: Phase A PostToolUse only invalidates own-write cache. Capture nudge is Phase B FR-041, telemetry-gated.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Day-30 anniversary prompts the engineer interactively in CLI.
conflicts.valis_position: Day-30 fires silently with auto-decision (continue for hosted, stop for self-hosted). Engineer overrides via valis config set telemetry on/off.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Phase B FRs ship together at the end of Phase A.
conflicts.valis_position: Phase B FRs are individually telemetry-gated per R-14; trigger eval lib computes ship/skip per FR-040..FR-044.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Hosted accounts get more features than self-hosted.
conflicts.valis_position: Self-hosted parity invariant (FR-033). All Phase A behaviors identical; only transmission default differs.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Three RBAC roles: admin / member / readonly.
conflicts.valis_position: Four levels per Constitution v1.2.1 Principle X: project_admin / project_maintainer / project_member / readonly.

conflicts.memory_md_position: We use sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2.
conflicts.valis_position: Multilingual e5-small (384d) via Qdrant Cloud Inference. EN parity + 16-40 pp gain on UA/RU/PL/DE/JA. PBaaS A/B tested.

conflicts.memory_md_position: valis_search returns chunk-only payloads.
conflicts.valis_position: valis_search supports expand: full | siblings; payload indexes on decision_id + chunk_index required (BUG #164 silent zero).

conflicts.memory_md_position: Decisions are ranked by recency only.
conflicts.valis_position: score = 0.4 * exp(-days_since_visited / 30) + 0.6 * relevance (R-06).

conflicts.memory_md_position: Context endpoint always returns 200 with fresh data.
conflicts.valis_position: Context endpoint sets ETag (sha256 of canonicalized payload sans fetched_at); 304 short-circuit on If-None-Match.

conflicts.memory_md_position: Block precedence is 'engineering' only.
conflicts.valis_position: Precedence enumerates seven domains: engineering, brand, communication, customer-facing copy, personal workflow, audience patterns, response patterns.
